description: List all top-level windows on the desktop. Returns list with hwnd, title, size, position, and class for each window. Note: hidden windows (minimized to system tray) have empty titles and are NOT included in the list — even though their process may still be running. If you can't find an app here but know it's running, use Get-Process via execute_command to confirm it's alive, then operate its system tray icon. Windows marked '(hidden)' were returned by the OS but are not visible — focus_window/restore_window may still work on them (e.g. taskbar-minimized windows), but will NOT work for tray-only apps. Example: {}
name: list_windows
